name: Turner, Gavin
resolved_employer: Mainsail Partners (Co-Founder & Managing Partner); 'Mainsail Management Company' is the firm's management entity
evidence: Gavin Turner is co-founder and Managing Partner of Mainsail Partners, a growth-equity firm investing in bootstrapped B2B/vertical SaaS companies (~$4B committed capital, 100+ companies). Mainsail opened a second office at 500 W 5th St in Austin in September 2021 and Turner personally relocated to Austin at that time, which corroborates the 78703 address and the November 2022 gift. Previously a VP at Summit Partners covering West Coast media and communications investments.

name: Jackson, Dauphen
resolved_employer: Fuquay, Inc. (Chief Financial Officer / Safety Officer)
evidence: Dauphen Jackson is CFO and Safety Officer of Fuquay, Inc., an Austin-area heavy civil/municipal utility construction contractor, where he has worked roughly 13 years after 12+ years in public accounting; he holds a BBA from Texas State University. Fuquay is listed in the Associated General Contractors of Texas municipal-utility directory. He served as President of Rodeo Austin in 2023 and 2024, confirming an Austin base consistent with the 78731 address and the self-reported 'Chief Financial Officer / Fuquay, Inc.' entry.

name: Gump, William
resolved_employer: Tower Commercial, Inc. (Principal / founder) — Austin commercial real estate tenant representation
evidence: William D. 'Bill' Gump is Principal of Tower Commercial, Inc., an Austin commercial real estate advisory firm he founded in 2010 that represents office and industrial tenants and investors (and, per the firm, never landlords). He previously spent 20+ years representing major Austin landlords including Southland Financial, Equity Office Properties Trust and Crescent Real Estate Equities, then moved to The Staubach Company/Jones Lang LaSalle in 2007. He is a licensed Texas real estate broker in Austin, matching the self-reported 'commercial real estate / Tower Commercial, Inc.' and the 78737 southwest Austin address.

name: Stout, Ashley
resolved_employer: Baxsto, LLC (sole owner / President) — oil, gas and mineral interests; formerly a landman
evidence: Ashley Baxter Stout is the sole owner and President of Baxsto, LLC, an Austin entity holding mineral and energy interests that she has owned and managed since 2013; she is a former landman. Baxsto was created in January 2014 when ABH Baxter LP split its interests into three entities. Texas appellate opinions (Baxsto, LLC v. Roxo Energy Co., 668 S.W.3d 912 (Tex. App. 2023), and a 2025 Seventh Court of Appeals case naming Ashley Baxter Stout and John Cole Stout) confirm both her role and the oil-and-gas nature of the business. Baxsto's mailing address is a PO Box in Austin 78703; her residential 78731 filing address and the exact self-reported 'owner / baxsto llc' entry corroborate the identification.

affiliations.org: Baxsto, LLC (and affiliated ABH Baxter LP / Blairbax Energy / Buffy Energy family entities)
affiliations.role: Sole owner and President; holder of oil, gas and mineral interests. Former landman.

name: Honeck, Creighton
resolved_employer: 360 Capital Partners, LLC (Austin real estate development and investment)
evidence: Creighton Honeck is an Austin native working in commercial real estate acquisitions and dispositions, including farm-and-ranch sales across Texas, and draws on his family's owned real estate portfolio; he played professional golf for eight years on the PGA, Web.com and European Tours before entering the business in March 2016. 360 Capital Partners is a confirmed Austin real estate development and investing firm, matching his self-reported 'Real Estate Development / 360 Capital Partners, LLC' and his southwest Austin residence (78716 is a PO-box zip). His broker profile currently lists him at a different firm, so the specific role at 360 Capital is not independently documented, but the sector classification is solid.

name: Slingerland, Emily
resolved_employer: Slingerland Family Charitable Fund (founder; sets strategic direction and oversees annual grants); Co-Founder and board member of Sheatree Capital, the Slingerland family office
evidence: Emily Slingerland established the Slingerland Family Charitable Fund in 2016 with her husband Brian; it works with 40+ grantees across child welfare, housing, early childhood education and maternal health with a Central Texas focus. She is Board President of Friends of the Children - Austin, serves on the board of CASA of Travis County, and is an investor in the Austin Community Foundation Women's Fund. She lives in Austin with four children, corroborating the 78703 address and the self-reported 'Board member / Philanthropy' entry. Earlier career: biotech project management at Genentech and healthcare/biotech executive recruiting at Russell Reynolds Associates; MBA, Stanford GSB.

affiliations.role: Co-Founder and board member (single-family office managing Slingerland family investments)

name: McCandless, Patricia
resolved_employer: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Texas / Health Care Service Corporation (Vice President, Texas Government Relations)
evidence: Patricia 'Pati' McCandless is Vice President of Texas Government Relations for Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Texas, a division of Health Care Service Corporation, and an attorney who was previously Senior Counsel at Akin Gump Strauss Hauer & Feld LLP; she holds a BS from Texas A&M and a JD from New York Law School. She has appeared on Texas legislative committee witness lists and spoke at the 2023 Texas Association of Health Plans conference. The self-reported title matches exactly and the West Lake Hills 78746 address is consistent with a state-capitol lobbying role. Note: she registers a heavy FEC history (259 recorded donations), consistent with an active government-relations professional.

affiliations.org: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Texas / Health Care Service Corporation
affiliations.role: Vice President, Texas Government Relations — health insurer lobbying

name: Mustafa, Parveen
evidence: Only weakly identified. Public-records aggregators place a Parveen C. Mustafa at a residential address on Lavon Bend in Austin 78717, matching the filing zip, apparently in a household with a Mohammad/Muhammad Mustafa. Beyond the address match there is no public profile establishing occupation or affiliations. The 'Not Employed' label reflects only her self-reported 'Home Maker / none' entry on the filing, not an independently verified fact.

name: Huntsberger, Carol
evidence: Carol Fowler Huntsberger is the owner of Quality Seafood Market at 5621 Airport Blvd in Austin, a seafood market/restaurant/wholesaler founded in 1938. She and her then-husband bought the business from Sam Eaves by 2003 and renamed it; she became sole owner in 2010 following a divorce and grew it from 8,000 to 16,000 square feet while adding catering. She earned an accounting degree from Texas State University in 1983 and was previously a Senior Sales Director at Mary Kay Cosmetics. The 78756 address is adjacent to the business, corroborating the self-reported 'Owner / Quality Seafood'.

name: Tynberg, Elisabeth
evidence: Tynberg LLC is a real estate owner and developer in the Central and North Texas markets, founded in 2008 by Alex Tynberg; it acquires and repositions multifamily apartment communities and develops mixed-use projects such as Northline, a transit-oriented development in Leander. The firm's registered address, 2501 Tarryhill Pl, is a residence in Austin 78703 matching the donor's zip. Travis County property records show Elisabeth Donovan Tynberg buying at 2710 Scenic Drive (78703) and Elisabeth D. Tynberg together with Alexander H. Tynberg and the Tynberg Family Living Trust at 1208 Shelley Avenue (78703), establishing she is part of the family behind the firm. Her self-reported 'Real Estate Professional / Tynberg LLC' is consistent, but she is not named on the firm's team page, so her specific role is undocumented.

name: Garbe, Christie
resolved_employer: Serasana Bee Cave (Owner, with Andy Garbe) — yoga, massage and acupuncture wellness studio; formerly a healthcare executive
evidence: Christie Garbe owns Serasana Bee Cave, a wellness studio at 15500 State Hwy 71 offering acupuncture, yoga, massage and herbal remedies, which opened as the third Austin-area Serasana location and which she and Andy Garbe own. Local coverage recounts that she was previously a healthcare executive in a fast-paced environment and opened the studio after yoga, acupuncture and massage improved her own health in her late 40s; she appears by name in the studio's own welcome video and in Community Impact reporting on the studio during the pandemic. The 78738 (Bee Cave/Lakeway) address matches the business location and the self-reported 'Owner / Serasana Bee Cave'. Classified Healthcare as a provider of acupuncture/massage health services; note the studio is a small owner-operated wellness business, not a clinical provider.

name: Shea, Kim
evidence: Maggie Mae's is a confirmed, long-established Austin live-music bar and entertainment venue at 323 E 6th Street, operating since 1978 across four restored historic buildings with five bars, two stages and a rooftop. A William Shea publicly organized a fundraiser to reopen Maggie Mae's, indicating a Shea connection to the venue's ownership or management, which is consistent with this donor's self-reported 'Corporate Secretary / Maggie Mae's'. However, no public source names Kim Shea specifically or documents her role, and the 78759 north-Austin residential zip does not independently corroborate. The industry label rests on the employer, which is unambiguous; her identity is not independently confirmed.
